color_system.philosophy: Strict 'No-Blue' Policy. All dark tones must be warm charcoal or neutral grey. Pure black is allowed only for depth.

surface_highlight.name: Charcoal Light
surface_highlight.usage: Hover states, active items, secondary cards

accent.name: Lexa Gold
accent.usage: Primary Buttons, Highlights, Active States, Key Icons

primary.base: bg-[#C9A962] text-[#050505] hover:bg-[#D4B875] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

secondary.base: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:border-[#C9A962] hover:text-[#C9A962] transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

cards.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-900 hover:border-[#C9A962]/50 transition-colors duration-300 p-8 flex flex-col gap-4
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-900 hover:border-[#C9A962] transition-all duration-500

inputs.base: bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800 focus:border-[#C9A962] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C9A962] text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 px-4 py-3 rounded-none outline-none transition-all

mobile_excellence_checklist: Touch Targets: All interactive elements must be min-height 44px.
Typography: No font size smaller than 14px for readable text (12px allowed for labels).
Padding: Minimum 20px (px-5) horizontal padding on all containers.
Stacking: Grid columns must collapse to 1 column on mobile (grid-cols-1).
Navigation: Use bottom sheet or full-screen overlay for mobile menu. No tiny hamburger menus.
Performance: Lazy load all images below the fold.

migration_guide.step_1_clean_palette: Replace all instances of slate-800, slate-900, gray-900, #0d1321 with #0A0A0A or #050505.
migration_guide.step_2_gold_standard: Ensure all accents are exactly #C9A962. Remove any blue-ish primary colors.
migration_guide.step_3_typography_audit: Apply the H1-H6 classes to all pages. Remove arbitrary pixel sizes (e.g., text-[40px]).
migration_guide.step_4_spacing_expansion: Increase all py-10 or py-12 to py-16 or py-24 for desktop.
migration_guide.step_5_border_refine: Change all borders to border-zinc-800 (subtle) or border-[#C9A962] (active). Remove thick borders.

universal_guidelines: Avoid Gradients on Backgrounds: Use solid #050505 with subtle noise texture if needed.
No Blue/Cool Tones: The palette is strictly Warm/Neutral.
Sharp Corners: Prefer rounded-none or rounded-sm for a technical, precise luxury feel.
Uppercase Labels: All small labels/tags must be uppercase with tracking-widest.
Data Test IDs: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

image_strategy.style: Cinematic, dark, warm lighting, high contrast.
image_strategy.subject_matter: Luxury interiors, smart home interfaces, affluent lifestyle, architectural details.
image_strategy.avoid: Generic stock photos, bright daylight scenes (unless specific context), cartoony illustrations.
